label: Dragon Ball
blurb: From the Saiyan saga to the Cell Games. Name who said the line.

quotes.q: Vegeta, what does the scouter say about his power level?
quotes.hint: The setup to the most famous line in anime dubbing

quotes.q: There is one thing a Saiyan always keeps... his pride!
quotes.hint: Shouted while shaking off Babidi's mind control

quotes.q: I am the hope of the universe.
quotes.hint: The Super Saiyan declaration on Namek

quotes.q: Ally to good! Nightmare to you!
quotes.hint: How the same Namek speech ends

quotes.q: I'm sorry, but this isn't even my final form.
There're three things I refuse to tolerate: cowardice, bad haircuts, and military insurrection.
quotes.hint: Tyranny with a sense of style

quotes.q: Gohan, you were the first friend I ever had.
quotes.hint: The demon king turned mentor, shielding his student

quotes.q: Eternal Dragon, by your name, I summon you forth, Shenron.

lore.question: How many Dragon Balls summon Shenron?
lore.hint: Scattered across the Earth after each wish

lore.question: What is Goku’s Saiyan birth name?
lore.hint: Vegeta refuses to call him anything else

lore.question: Who is Goku’s Saiyan father?
lore.hint: A low-class warrior who saw Frieza’s betrayal coming

lore.question: The Namekian Dragon Balls summon which dragon?
lore.hint: He grants three wishes, not one

lore.question: Which technique lets Goku teleport by sensing ki?
lore.hint: Learned on Planet Yardrat, two fingers to the forehead

lore.question: Who created the Androids and Cell?
lore.hint: The Red Ribbon Army’s vengeful scientist

lore.question: With a tail intact, a Saiyan under a full moon becomes what?
lore.hint: Ten times the power, none of the self-control

lore.question: Krillin marries which former enemy?
lore.hint: He wished the bomb out of her chest first

lore.question: What is the name of the golden cloud Goku rides?
lore.hint: Only the pure of heart can ride it
